notes: Expands Tater's Picks into a mixed-source recommendation page informed by viewing history from every reporting player module.
Adds safe, launchable over-the-air channel recommendations without storing or exposing live stream URLs.
Replaces per-item narration with one personalized morning, afternoon, or evening briefing that continues while recommendations are browsed.
Refreshes the VCR-style page with a collection overview, clear source labels, and a written Why This Pick summary for each recommendation.
Returns directly to the prior selection without replaying the same briefing after opening a recommendation.
